headline: Colgate-Palmolive Webcasts 2026 Second Quarter Earnings Conference Call July 31, 2026 – 8:30 a.m. ET
summary: NEW YORK, July 17, 2026--Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) will provide a live webcast of its 2026 second quarter earnings conference call on Friday, July 31, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The call will be hosted by Chairman, President and CEO, Noel Wallace, Chief Financial Officer, Stan Sutula, Executive Vice President, Investor Relations, Claire Ross, and Executive Vice President, M&A and Special Projects, John Faucher. Investors may access the earnings press release, prepared materials and the liv
